summary: R2 fixes the independent QA REQUEST_CHANGES by making parsed goal-mode and model-routing canonical current state consistently point to RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 REVIEW, preserving the real active lead thread, keeping downstream RR0 work DRAFT, and retaining the M7 renderer task only as non-active PARTIAL evidence.

tests_run.result: Only RR0 allowed process/state files and the QA REQUEST_CHANGES handoff were dirty/untracked before commit.

tests_run.command: node .agents/skills/monsoon-studio-orchestrator/scripts/taskctl.mjs validate RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 RR0-REPOSITORY-STATE-RECONCILIATION-001 RR0-PRODUCTION-FIXTURE-NOOP-AUDIT-001 RR0-STATUS-LEDGER-COMPACTION-001 RR0-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RENDERER-INTERACTION-001
tests_run.result: Each of the six task JSON files validated; taskctl emits one VALID line per explicit invocation.
RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 is REVIEW; the four downstream RR0 tasks are DRAFT; M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RENDERER-INTERACTION-001 is PARTIAL.
No output, matching the dependency design: downstream R0 tasks are not READY until RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 is accepted.

tests_run.command: pnpm exec prettier --check docs/11-roadmap.md docs/23-milestone-acceptance-matrix.md docs/29-product-recovery-roadmap.md project/tasks/active/RR0-*.json
tests_run.result: All matched files use Prettier code style.

tests_run.command: node -e parse all changed JSON files
tests_run.result: Parsed goal-mode-state, model-routing-state, thread-registry, RR0 task files, M7 renderer task, and QA handoff; 10 JSON files parsed.

tests_run.command: PowerShell here-string Node semantic assertion for goal/model current R0 state
tests_run.result: semantic assertion passed: RR0 REVIEW current state, active lead, downstream DRAFT tasks, non-active M7 renderer.

tests_run.command: git diff --name-only and git ls-files --others allowed-path assertion
tests_run.result: Changed/untracked files were limited to project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/active/RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001.json, project/tasks/thread-registry.json, and the QA handoff before the fix commit.
VALID after this R2 handoff file was written.

decisions.decision: goal-mode-state.json and model-routing-state.json now parse to current_milestone=R0, current_task=RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001, current_tasks=[RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001], current_task_status=REVIEW, and a QA rereview next_machine_action.

The only operationally active lead remains 019eff50-c69d-7612-a90b-7024a47e0af5; model active_threads no longer exposes old M7 schema/client work. The real QA reviewer thread 019f4adb-1530-75a2-a801-a16b640793bf is preserved in the task file and thread registry without fabricating model or effort.
All four RR0 downstream tasks remain DRAFT behind RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001, and M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RENDERER-INTERACTION-001 remains PARTIAL non-active retained evidence.
The QA REQUEST_CHANGES handoff is included as an artifact and was committed with the R2 state fix for audit continuity.

risks.summary: The large state ledgers intentionally retain historical M7 entries and text; the semantic assertion scopes the contract to parsed canonical current/current_tasks/current_status/action and active_threads rather than deleting history.
This handoff references the R2 fix commit d6d883d564e9d536a111bc6cff853219a591f76b. If the handoff file itself is committed afterward, that later commit is handoff-only.

requested_action: Please perform independent QA re-review of RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 R2 and either ACCEPT or return REQUEST_CHANGES with concrete parsed-state evidence.
